mapper.select: /* FileMapper.selectFileord */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(FILEORD), 0) + 1 FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE ATCHFILENO = #{atchfileno}

/* FileMapper.selectFileList */ SELECT ATCHFILENO AS atchfileno ,FILEORD AS fileord ,ORGFILENM AS orgfilenm ,SVFILENM AS svfilenm ,FILEEXT AS fileext ,FILEDIR AS filedir ,FILESIZE AS filesize FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE ATCHFILENO = #{atchfileno} ORDER BY FILEORD
/* FileMapper.selectFile */ SELECT ORGFILENM AS orgfilenm ,SVFILENM AS svfilenm ,FILEDIR AS filedir FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE ATCHFILENO = #{atchfileno} AND FILEORD = #{fileord}
